items.question: Which models are supported?
items.answer: We currently support OpenAI (GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, o1, etc.), Claude (claude-opus-4, claude-sonnet-4, etc.), and Gemini (gemini-2.5-flash, etc.) full model families. The list is continuously updated.

items.question: How do I top up?
items.answer: After purchasing a redeem code, enter it in the console to instantly add token credits to your account.

items.question: Can I get a refund?
items.answer: Unused redeem codes are eligible for a full refund. Token credits that have already been redeemed are non-refundable.

items.question: How is this different from the official API?
items.answer: We provide a relay service for official APIs with 100% compatible interfaces. The advantage is direct access from China, no VPN needed, and lower pricing.

items.question: Are there rate limits?
items.answer: Standard and Premium plans have no additional rate limits. The Starter plan may experience slight queuing during peak times, but this won't affect normal usage.

footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: In accordance with laws and regulations in mainland China, this site does not provide any OpenAI-related services to users from mainland China. Users from mainland China are requested to stop accessing this site voluntarily.
